languages.text: "Будет исполнено... Лорд-капитан, {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}авгуры{/g} регистрируют корабли {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}ксеносов{/g}! Идут на сближение!"

traits.locale_text: "Будет исполнено... Лорд-капитан, {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}авгуры{/g} регистрируют корабли {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}ксеносов{/g}! Идут на сближение!"

languages.text: "It will be done... Lord Captain, {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} are detecting {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} vessels! They're closing in!"

languages.text: 「完了します…艦長、異星艦を検知しました！接近中！」
languages.original_text: "It will be done... Lord Captain, augurs detecting xenos vessels! They're closing in!"
"It will be done... Lord Captain, {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} are detecting {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} vessels! They're closing in!"

languages.text: “立即执行……舰长大人，{g|Encyclopedia:Augur}俄歇矩阵{/g}侦测到{g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}异形{/g}舰船正向我方逼近！”
languages.original_text: "It will be done... Lord Captain, {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} are detecting {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} vessels! They're closing in!"

traits.locale_text: “立即执行……舰长大人，{g|Encyclopedia:Augur}俄歇矩阵{/g}侦测到{g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}异形{/g}舰船正向我方逼近！”

languages.text: "Wird erledigt ... Lord Captain, {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}Auguren{/g} haben {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}Xenos{/g}-Schiffe geortet! Sie kommen näher!"
languages.original_text: "It will be done... Lord Captain, {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} are detecting {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} vessels! They're closing in!"

traits.locale_text: "Wird erledigt ... Lord Captain, {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}Auguren{/g} haben {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}Xenos{/g}-Schiffe geortet! Sie kommen näher!"

languages.text: « À vos ordres... {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, les {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augures{/g} détectent des vaisseaux {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xénos{/g} en approche ! »
languages.original_text: "It will be done... Lord Captain, {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} are detecting {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} vessels! They're closing in!"

traits.locale_text: « À vos ordres... {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, les {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augures{/g} détectent des vaisseaux {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xénos{/g} en approche ! »

languages.text: «Así se hará... ¡Lord Capitán, los {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augures{/g} detectan naves {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g}! ¡Se acercan!».
